69 AA4 AA4_RACE_ETH (AA4) Race/Ethnicity CHAR 1 Resident' race/ethinicity. 1 = American Indian/Alaskan Native; 2 = Asian/Pacific Islander; 3 = Black, not of Hispanic origin; 4 = Hispanic; 5 = White, not of Hispanic origin; "-" = Unknown
70 AA6A AA6A_FAC_MCAID_NBR (AA6A) Facility Medicaid Number CHAR 15 State facility provider number.
